voiceAssistant.subtitle: Voice Assistant

empty.prompt: Ask me about your shift schedule
empty.example1: What shift do I have tomorrow?
empty.example2: When is my next day off?
empty.example3: How many night shifts this month?

permission.notice: Ellie needs microphone access to hear your questions.

status.wakeWordUnavailable: Wake-word unavailable, tap the mic to talk
status.askAnother: Tap the mic to ask another question
status.askEllie: Tap the mic to ask Ellie
status.typeOrGrantMic: Type below or grant microphone access to talk

errors.permissionDeniedIos: Microphone access denied. Enable in Settings > Ellie.
errors.permissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Please grant permission.
errors.recognition: I didn't catch that. Please try again.
errors.backend: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
errors.wakeWordUnavailable: Wake-word unavailable, tap the mic to talk.

micA11y.listening: Stop listening. Double tap to finish speaking.
micA11y.speaking: Ellie is speaking. Double tap to stop.
micA11y.error: Error: {{message}}. Double tap to try again.
micA11y.idle: Ask Ellie a question. Double tap to start speaking.

voiceAssistant.retryHint: Tap the mic to try again

warnings.microphonePermissionRequired: Microphone permission required for Hey Ellie. Tap mic to talk.
warnings.wakeWordUnavailableTapToTalk: Wake-word unavailable, tap mic to talk.

offlineFallback.workingTodayYes: Yes, you're on a {{shiftType}} shift today.
offlineFallback.workingTodayNo: No, today is your day off.
offlineFallback.shiftTodayOff: You have the day off today, {{userName}}! Rest and recharge.
offlineFallback.shiftsThisWeek: This week: {{dayCount}} day shifts, {{nightCount}} night shifts, and {{offCount}} days off.
offlineFallback.shiftsThisWeekThreeShift: This week: {{morningCount}} morning shifts, {{afternoonCount}} afternoon shifts, {{nightCount}} night shifts, and {{offCount}} days off.
offlineFallback.daysOffThisMonth: You have {{count}} days off this month.
offlineFallback.nightShiftsThisMonth: You have {{count}} night shifts this month.
offlineFallback.patternSummaryRotating: Your pattern is {{dayCount}} day shifts, {{nightCount}} night shifts, then {{offCount}} days off.
offlineFallback.patternSummaryThreeShift: Your pattern is {{morningCount}} morning shifts, {{afternoonCount}} afternoon shifts, {{nightCount}} night shifts, then {{offCount}} days off.
offlineFallback.patternSummaryFifo: Your pattern is {{workDays}} days on site, then {{restDays}} days off.
offlineFallback.unsupportedWithNextShift: I can't answer that fully offline yet, but I still know your saved roster. Your next work shift is {{shiftType}} on {{date}}. Try asking about tomorrow, your next day off, night shifts this month, or your pattern.
offlineFallback.unsupportedGeneric: I can't answer that fully offline yet, but I can still help with your saved roster. Try asking about tomorrow, your next day off, night shifts this month, or your pattern.

notices.offlineRecognitionUnavailable: Offline voice input isn't available on this device right now.
notices.audioUnavailable: Audio replies aren't available right now. You can still read Ellie's answer.

voiceAssistant.offlineHint: Offline answers are limited to simple roster questions saved on this device.

prep.fatigueCritical: Fatigue risk is critical. Give yourself extra time.
prep.title: Time to prepare, {{name}}

commute.title: Leave now
commute.body: Head out now to reach your {{shiftType}} on time. It starts at {{startTime}}.

briefing.title: Briefing soon
briefing.body: Shift briefing is in 15 minutes before your {{shiftType}} at {{startTime}}.

postShift.title: How did that go?
postShift.body: How was your {{shiftType}}? Log your energy level in Ellie.

fatigue.title: Critical fatigue alert
fatigue.body: Your {{shiftType}} starts at {{startTime}}, but your sleep data shows critical fatigue. Rest now if you can.

backToBack.title: {{count}} night shifts coming up
backToBack.body: You have {{count}} consecutive night shifts starting {{shiftDate}}. Prioritize rest.

shortTurnaround.title: Short turnaround ahead
shortTurnaround.body: Only {{gapHours}}h between your {{previousShiftType}} and next {{nextShiftType}} on {{shiftDate}}. Plan your rest.

flyOut.title: Fly-out day
flyOut.body: Today you head home. Complete your handover, pack your gear, and travel safely.

travelTomorrow.title: Travel day tomorrow
travelTomorrow.body: You fly in tomorrow for your {{shiftType}}. Pack your gear and check your documents tonight.

shiftCheckIn.title: Log your energy after this shift
shiftCheckIn.subtitle: {{shiftType}} on {{shiftDate}} · {{startTime}} - {{endTime}}
shiftCheckIn.energyPrompt: How was your energy on this shift?
shiftCheckIn.notesPlaceholder: Anything worth remembering about this shift?
shiftCheckIn.savedOffline: Check-in saved locally. It will sync when you are back online.
shiftCheckIn.error: This check-in could not be saved right now. Try again.

onboardingChecklist.title: Get the most out of Ellie
